🚀 Big Launches.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
🚀 Big Launches.summary: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.

🚀 Big Launches.title: I/O 2026
🚀 Big Launches.summary: At Google I/O 2026, we shared how we’re making AI more helpful for everyone. See everything we announced.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Gemini 3.5 text and multi-colored star icon on an abstract blue background.

🚀 Big Launches.title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of models
🚀 Big Launches.summary: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of models

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: Google's Genie world model can now simulate real streets with Street View
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: Google DeepMind is integrating Street View with Project Genie to create immersive, interactive world simulations for robotics, gaming, and travel.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Google takes a page out of Meta’s book, announces new audio-powered smart glasses at IO 2026
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Google is calling the new devices "audio glasses," in that users will be able to issue verbal commands to them and get things done via its ecosystem of apps and services, including Gemini.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: With Gemini 3.5 Flash, Google bets its next AI wave on agents, not chatbots
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Google launched Gemini 3.5 Flash, its most powerful coding and agentic AI model yet, at the company's annual developer conference.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: OpenAI is making it easier to check if an image was made by their models
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: OpenAI announced two new measures to help detect AI generated imagery: joining the open C2PA standard and adding Google's SynthID to its products.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Google's Genie world model can now simulate real streets with Street View
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Google DeepMind is integrating Street View with Project Genie to create immersive, interactive world simulations for robotics, gaming, and travel.

tool_of_day.title: Google's Genie world model can now simulate real streets with Street View
tool_of_day.summary: Google DeepMind is integrating Street View with Project Genie to create immersive, interactive world simulations for robotics, gaming, and travel.

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards more agentic and interactive experiences, with Google's Gemini and Genie models leading the charge, and companies like OpenAI focusing on responsible AI practices.
